goals.title: Strategy Synthesis Engine
goals.description: Combine retrieved evidence from LakeOS + recall.it into ranked strategy options with IQRSQPI scoring

goals.title: Market Wargame Simulator
goals.description: Model competitor moves, buyer pain scenarios, and RIG response options with falsification gates

goals.title: Competitor Intelligence Pipeline
goals.description: Turn competitor changes into RIG response options with source-backed evidence

goals.title: Client Intelligence Synthesizer
goals.description: Turn prospect/client evidence into wedge offers and positioning angles

goals.title: Prediction Crux Engine
goals.description: Turn strategic questions into forecast variables, cruxes, and Brier score tracking

goals.title: Consensus Delta Tracker
goals.description: Compare new research against current beliefs, surface contradictions, update confidence

goals.title: GTM Planning Surface
goals.description: Generate go-to-market plans from strategy synthesis + recall.it GTM cards
